thig10.1:1.1: Having admirable friends has been praised by the Sage
thig10.1:2.1: People of integrity should be associated with.
thig10.1:2.4: one would be released from all suffering & stress,
thig10.1:3.2: the origination of stress, cessation & the eightfold path:
thig10.1:4.1: Stressful, painful, is the woman’s state:
thig10.1:4.2: So says the tamer of tamable people.
thig10.1:5.2: Others, of delicate constitution, take poison.
thig10.1:5.3: In the midst of a breech-birth
thig10.1:6.1: Going along, about to give birth,
thig10.1:6.4: I hadn’t reached my own home.
thig10.1:7.2: my husband dead in the road —miserable me!
thig10.1:7.4: were burning on a single pyre.
thig10.1:9.1: Then I saw, in the midst of the charnel ground,
thig10.1:9.2: the muscles of sons being chewed.
thig10.1:9.3: With family killed, despised by all,
thig10.1:9.4: my husband dead, I reached the deathless.
thig10.1:10.2: noble, eightfold, going to the deathless.
thig10.1:10.4: I’ve gazed in the mirror of Dhamma.
thig10.1:11.2: put down the burden, done the task.
thig10.1:11.4: my heart well released, have said this.
